articles.title: US-Iran war LIVE: Uncertainty shrouds talks in Doha as Tehran rejects Trump's claims; oil prices fall
articles.description: US-Iran war LIVE updates: The United States and Iran separately confirmed on Monday that they would send delegations to Qatar. However, Tehran said that it has not agreed to hold talks with the US. Meanwhile, oil prices fell on Tuesday over the potential talks in Doha. | World News

articles.title: Oil prices ease as investors await US-Iran talks; Brent crude falls to $72 per barrel
articles.description: International Business News: Oil prices continued to ease on Tuesday as markets tracked the outcome of potential US-Iran engagement in Doha, even as weekend missile exchanges sign.

articles.title: Oil falls as investors focus on potential Iran-US talks in Doha
articles.description: Oil prices dipped as markets keenly watched potential U.S.-Iran talks in Doha, following recent missile exchanges that tested a fragile ceasefire. While investors express cautious optimism for de-escalation and a return to normal shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, uncertainty lingers. Middle Eastern producers are actively loading oil and LNG, with analysts predicting a recovery in Gulf flows to pre-war levels soon.

articles.title: Trump warns US fuel retailers: Cut gasoline prices immediately or face 'big problems'
articles.description: US President Donald Trump has urged fuel retailers to cut gasoline prices immediately, saying crude oil has fallen to around $68 a barrel. He warned of "big problems" for retailers that fail to lower pump prices and renewed his criticism of California's fuel taxes

articles.title: Trump tells gas stations to slash prices or face ‘big problems’ ahead
articles.description: President Donald Trump urged gas station owners to lower gas prices to $2.50 a gallon, warning of consequences and criticizing California gas tax policies.

articles.title: India's oil import cost falls below $70, first since Iran war began. But petrol, diesel price cut unlikely
articles.description: The average price of the Indian basket of crude fell to $68.86 a barrel, down more than 56% from a peak of $157.04 on March 23 after the outbreak of the war. | India News

articles.title: Oil set to end June down by about 20%, with investors focused on Doha
articles.description: Oil prices dipped around 1% on Tuesday, reversing the previous ‌session's gains, and were poised for a monthly decline, with investors eyeing potential U.S.-Iran talks in Doha amid a strained interim ceasefire in the four-month-old war.

articles.title: Oil Prices On June 30: Brent Crude At $73 As Iran Pushes For Strait Of Hormuz Control Ahead Of US Talks
articles.description: Brent crude for September delivery traded above $73 a barrel after climbing 1.8% in the previous session, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) hovered near $70 a barrel.

articles.title: Oil prices hold gains ahead of US
articles.description: Brent traded above $73 a barrel after rising 1.8% in the previous session. Meanwhile, West Texas Intermediate was near $70 a barrel.
